base_selection.selection_method: CH-SVM and FFT12-LR selected by stratified grouped CV on train+validation work groups; fusion alpha selected on grouped OOF train+validation predictions; held-out test used once after refit.

leakage_note: Base reranker training features are grouped OOF predictions on train+validation. The held-out test split is used once after selecting the reranker by meta-CV.
